mapper.sql: id, task_no, inquiry_apply_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, customer_no, end_user, purchase_no, order_status, supplier_id, inquiry_status, inquiry_handle_result, hope_export_date, dlv_moddate, hope_delivery_date, inquiry_reason_type, inquiry_reason, inquiry_description, inquiry_remark, inquiry_type, inquiry_time, inquiry_dept, inquiry_user, inquiry_user_name, reply_dept, supplier_order_no, reply_no, reply_delivery_date, reply_user, reply_time, reply_delay_reason, reply_remark, inquiry_level, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, reply_supplier_dept, poNo, lineItem, rorder_no, rorder_item, splitItemNo, smcCode, purchaseType, inquiry_reason_param, item_no, reply_delivery_date_src, reply_result_desc
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inquiry_po_handle
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_po_handle (id, task_no, inquiry_apply_no, order_no, model_no, quantity, customer_no, end_user, purchase_no, order_status, supplier_id, inquiry_status, mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inquiry_po_handle
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
task_no = #{record.taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_apply_no = #{record.inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_no = #{record.purchaseNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
order_status = #{record.orderStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_status = #{record.inquiryStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inquiry_handle_result = #{record.inquiryHandleResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{record.hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE},
dlv_moddate = #{record.dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_delivery_date = #{record.hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
inquiry_reason_type = #{record.inquiryReasonType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_reason = #{record.inquiryReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_description = #{record.inquiryDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_remark = #{record.inquiryRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_type = #{record.inquiryType,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_time = #{record.inquiryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inquiry_dept = #{record.inquiryDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_user = #{record.inquiryUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_user_name = #{record.inquiryUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_dept = #{record.replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_order_no = #{record.supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{record.replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_date = #{record.replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_user = #{record.replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{record.replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_delay_reason = #{record.replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reply_remark = #{record.replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_level = #{record.inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_supplier_dept = #{record.replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{record.lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_reason_param = #{record.inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_delivery_date_src = #{record.replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_result_desc = #{record.replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_inquiry_po_handle
task_no = #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_apply_no = #{inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_no = #{purchaseNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_status = #{inquiryStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inquiry_handle_result = #{inquiryHandleResult,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE},
dlv_moddate = #{dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_delivery_date = #{hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
inquiry_reason_type = #{inquiryReasonType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_reason = #{inquiryReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_description = #{inquiryDescription,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_remark = #{inquiryRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_type = #{inquiryType,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_time = #{inquiryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inquiry_dept = #{inquiryDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_user = #{inquiryUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inquiry_user_name = #{inquiryUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_dept = #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_order_no = #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_date = #{replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_user = #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_delay_reason = #{replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reply_remark = #{replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_level = #{inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_supplier_dept = #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
smcCode = #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_reason_param = #{inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_delivery_date_src = #{replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_result_desc = #{replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
